testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getFibonacci(n) F-001: should return 0n for n = 0
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getFibonacci(n) F-001: should return 0n for n = 0

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getFibonacci(n) F-002: should return 1n for n = 1
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getFibonacci(n) F-002: should return 1n for n = 1

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getFibonacci(n) F-005: should return 55n for n = 10
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getFibonacci(n) F-005: should return 55n for n = 10

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getFibonacci(n) F-006: should return 6765n for n = 20
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getFibonacci(n) F-006: should return 6765n for n = 20

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getFibonacci(n) F-008: should correctly calculate large numbers (n=100)
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getFibonacci(n) F-008: should correctly calculate large numbers (n=100)

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic isPalindrome(n) P-001: should return true for a single digit (0n)
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic isPalindrome(n) P-001: should return true for a single digit (0n)

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic isPalindrome(n) P-004: should return true for an odd-length palindrome (121n)
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic isPalindrome(n) P-004: should return true for an odd-length palindrome (121n)

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic isPalindrome(n) P-005: should return true for an even-length palindrome (1221n)
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic isPalindrome(n) P-005: should return true for an even-length palindrome (1221n)

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic isPalindrome(n) P-008: should return false for a non-palindrome (12n)
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic isPalindrome(n) P-008: should return false for a non-palindrome (12n)

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic isPalindrome(n) P-011: should return false for a number ending in zero (100n)
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic isPalindrome(n) P-011: should return false for a number ending in zero (100n)

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-001: should return the number itself if it is a palindrome
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-001: should return the number itself if it is a palindrome

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-002: should find the nearest smaller palindrome
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-002: should find the nearest smaller palindrome

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-003: should find the nearest larger palindrome
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-003: should find the nearest larger palindrome

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-008: should find a smaller palindrome with different length
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-008: should find a smaller palindrome with different length

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-012: should work for the Fib(20) example
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-012: should work for the Fib(20) example

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-004: should handle equidistant case (favors smaller)
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) NP-004: should handle equidistant case (favors smaller)

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) should handle a very large number
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic getNearestPalindromeConstructive(num) should handle a very large number

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic generatePalindromeFromRoot(root, originalLength) should generate an even-length palindrome from a root
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic generatePalindromeFromRoot(root, originalLength) should generate an even-length palindrome from a root

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic generatePalindromeFromRoot(root, originalLength) should generate an odd-length palindrome from a root
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic generatePalindromeFromRoot(root, originalLength) should generate an odd-length palindrome from a root

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic generatePalindromeFromRoot(root, originalLength) should handle single-digit roots
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic generatePalindromeFromRoot(root, originalLength) should handle single-digit roots

testcase.classname: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic generatePalindromeFromRoot(root, originalLength) should return null for a "0" or empty root
testcase.name: Fibonacci Palindrome Finder Logic generatePalindromeFromRoot(root, originalLength) should return null for a "0" or empty root
